parameters.name: app_id
parameters.description: The uuidV4 identifier of the app the tester group is connected to.

parameters.name: items_per_page
parameters.description: Specifies the maximum number of tester groups returned per request.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Specifies which page should be returned from the whole result set in a paginated scenario.

parameters.name: installable_artifact_id
parameters.description: When provided, each tester group is decorated with `notification_sent` (whether a notification for this artifact has already been sent to the group) and, for external tester groups, `custom_access_link` (the access link sent to the testers: id, name, url, expires_at, access_code; omitted when there is none). The access code is not exposed via the public API.
